title: Sign up with valid data
preconditions: The app is open and on the sign-up screen
test_steps: Enter 'John Doe' in the 'NAME' field | Enter 'johndoe@example.com' in the 'EMAIL' field | Enter 'P@ssw0rd' in the 'PASSWORD' field | Enter 'P@ssw0rd' in the 'RETYPE PASSWORD' field | Click the 'SIGN UP' button
expected_result: The user is successfully registered and redirected to the home screen

title: Sign up with empty fields
preconditions: The app is open and on the sign-up screen
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that all fields are required

title: Sign up with invalid email
preconditions: The app is open and on the sign-up screen
test_steps: Enter 'John Doe' in the 'NAME' field | Enter 'johndoe@example' in the 'EMAIL' field | Enter 'P@ssw0rd' in the 'PASSWORD' field | Enter 'P@ssw0rd' in the 'RETYPE PASSWORD' field | Click the 'SIGN UP' button
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the email is invalid

title: Sign up with different passwords
preconditions: The app is open and on the sign-up screen
test_steps: Enter 'John Doe' in the 'NAME' field | Enter 'johndoe@example.com' in the 'EMAIL' field | Enter 'P@ssw0rd' in the 'PASSWORD' field | Enter 'P@ssw0rd123' in the 'RETYPE PASSWORD' field | Click the 'SIGN UP' button
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the passwords do not match

title: Sign up with special characters in password
preconditions: The app is open and on the sign-up screen
test_steps: Enter 'John Doe' in the 'NAME' field | Enter 'johndoe@example.com' in the 'EMAIL' field | Enter 'P@ssw0rd!' in the 'PASSWORD' field | Enter 'P@ssw0rd!' in the 'RETYPE PASSWORD' field | Click the 'SIGN UP' button
expected_result: The user is successfully registered and redirected to the home screen

title: Sign up with long password
preconditions: The app is open and on the sign-up screen
test_steps: Enter 'John Doe' in the 'NAME' field | Enter 'johndoe@example.com' in the 'EMAIL' field | Enter 'P@ssw0rd1234567890' in the 'PASSWORD' field | Enter 'P@ssw0rd1234567890' in the 'RETYPE PASSWORD' field | Click the 'SIGN UP' button
expected_result: The user is successfully registered and redirected to the home screen
